title: polystachya elatior
intro: Polystachya elatior, also known as the "Greater Polystachya," is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystachya elatior include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Polystachya elatior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
